overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character traversing a rural Japanese landscape during autumn golden hour. The character crosses a wooden bridge, walks through tall grass meadows, passes farm workers near a cart, and approaches a traditional wooden building.

events.description: character steps off the wooden bridge onto the grassy bank

agents.ego_description: samurai character walks across a wooden bridge and steps onto the grassy bank, approaching a villager

notable_agents.action: villager in white and red garments standing near a tree, watching the character approach

entered.detail: traditional wooden bridge with dark railings and ornate green copper post caps
decorative green copper-colored post cap on bridge railing with intricate design
traditional Japanese stone lantern at the bridge entrance
dense field of tall grass with wildflowers beyond the bridge
mature tree with thick trunk and spreading branches beside the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai crossing a traditional wooden bridge with ornate green posts. At 4 seconds, the character steps off onto a grassy bank where a villager stands near a tree watching. The scene is lit by warm golden hour sunlight with a large tree framing the right side.

agents.ego_description: samurai walks steadily through waist-high grass and wildflowers toward the distant village

entered.detail: bushes and small trees with bright red and orange autumn leaves
traditional Japanese wooden building visible on the horizon
small rock formations scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The samurai traverses a wide-open meadow filled with tall grass and wildflowers. Red autumn foliage dots the left side while a traditional building becomes visible in the distant center. The bridge and its posts disappear behind as the character moves deeper into the field.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farm path with scattered red leaves

events.description: ground surface changes from tall grass to dirt path covered in scattered red autumn leaves
passing by farm workers and a wooden cart near the path

agents.ego_description: samurai walks along a dirt path covered in red leaves, passing farm workers and a wooden cart on the left

notable_agents.action: farm worker in red garment standing near a wooden cart with large wheels
group of villagers standing near bamboo fence beside the path

entered.detail: unpaved dirt path covered with scattered red autumn leaves
wooden farm cart with large spoked wheels parked beside the path
traditional wooden farmhouse with dark timber framing and curved roof
wooden fence made of bamboo poles enclosing farm plots

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a dirt path strewn with red autumn leaves. The samurai passes farm workers near a wooden cart and a traditional farmhouse on the left, while villagers stand near a bamboo fence on the right. The distant building grows larger as the character approaches.

events.description: entering the stone courtyard of the traditional wooden building

agents.ego_description: samurai approaches and enters the stone courtyard of a large traditional wooden building

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese building with curved tiled roof and wooden pillars
flat stone-paved courtyard in front of the main building
dense cluster of bamboo plants beside the building entrance
open shelter with thatched roof adjacent to the main building

segments.scene_description: The samurai enters a stone courtyard approaching a large traditional wooden building with a curved roof. Bamboo grows thick on the right side near a thatched shelter. The farm path and cart are left behind as the character moves into the shaded courtyard area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a traditional wooden bridge through a rural autumn landscape that culminates at a large wooden estate. It begins with a samurai crossing a bridge with ornate green posts and stepping onto a grassy bank under the warm glow of golden hour sunlight. As the character moves forward, the bridge recedes and the scene opens into a wide meadow of tall grass and wildflowers dotted with red autumn foliage. The terrain then shifts from the open field to a leaf-strewn dirt path, passing farm workers by a wooden cart and villagers near a bamboo fence. Finally, the path leads the samurai into a shaded stone courtyard flanked by thick bamboo as they approach a large traditional building with a curved roof.
